summary: Comprehensive testing of PR-4 Web Auth Cookie Compat Layer - All backend API tests and frontend UI tests passed. Cookie-based session, session bootstrap on page reload, logout flow, and legacy bearer token fallback all working correctly.

frontend_issues.note: Console errors observed (400/500 responses) are from pre-existing non-auth endpoints like partner notification summary/tenant features - not related to PR-4 auth scope

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/login with X-Client-Platform:web sets httpOnly cookies
✅ Backend: Login response includes auth_transport: cookie_compat for web requests
✅ Backend: Login response includes auth_transport: bearer for legacy requests
✅ Backend: GET /api/auth/me works with cookie session (no Authorization header)
✅ Backend: /api/auth/me sanitizes sensitive fields (no password_hash, totp_secret, etc.)
✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/refresh with empty body uses cookie refresh_token
✅ Backend: Refresh token rotation works (new cookie issued)
✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/logout clears session and cookies
✅ Backend: Legacy bearer token auth works (mobile/legacy compat)
✅ Backend: Legacy refresh with body token works
✅ Backend: X-Auth-Transport header set correctly on login/refresh
✅ Frontend: Login page loads with data-testid attributes
✅ Frontend: Login form submission redirects to /app/admin/agencies
✅ Frontend: Page reload preserves session (session bootstrap works)
✅ Frontend: RequireAuth gate redirects unauthenticated user to /login
critical_code_review_comments: Backend auth.py correctly implements _sanitize_auth_user to remove sensitive fields
Cookie config uses httpOnly:true for security
Frontend api.js correctly uses withCredentials:true for cookie transport
cookieAuthCompat.js properly implements bootstrap flow with /auth/me + refresh fallback
RequireAuth component uses useCurrentUser hook for session bootstrap
Note: Some 400/500 console errors visible on admin page are from pre-existing unrelated endpoints (partner notifications, tenant features) - not PR-4 auth scope
context_for_next_testing_agent: PR-4 Web Auth Cookie Compat Layer fully tested. Key features: X-Client-Platform:web header triggers cookie_compat auth transport, cookies set on login/refresh, /auth/me works with cookies, sensitive fields sanitized, logout clears cookies, legacy bearer flow still works. Console errors on admin page (400/500) are from partner notification/tenant features endpoints - unrelated to auth.

frontend_verification.Session bootstrap: ✅ Page reload preserves session via cookie + /auth/me
